name: @openagentsinc/qa-runner
description: Khala autonomous-QA runner (EPIC #6174). Executes a computer-use session through the Probe computer-use tools against a Target (dev/prod), inside an isolation backend, and emits dereferenceable public-safe artifacts: a playable video (mp4/webm) + Playwright trace + per-step screenshots + result.json. A scriptedBrain + localBackend run NOW; khalaBrain and cloudVmBackend are owner/flag-gated seams.

scripts.test: bun test src/runner.test.ts src/public-safety.test.ts src/brain.test.ts src/backend.test.ts src/terminal-backend.test.ts src/khala-action.test.ts src/khala-driver.test.ts src/khala-config.test.ts src/khala-openrouter.test.ts src/session-trace.test.ts src/distiller.test.ts src/khala-session.test.ts src/compose/build-plan.test.ts src/compose/ffmpeg.test.ts src/evals.test.ts
